description: Style NoteAccesorise your outfit with fabulous bangles from adrika. It will grab attention with its subtle beauty and exquisite designs. Wear it for that special day and get the mood just right with this piece!Product DetailsBeige ,blue and pink beaded bangle that has a lace strand in between and is an interlooped design with an opening that can be stretched to slide the hand throughMaterial and CarePlastic beads, lace and a metal braceletWipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dustSizeDiameter: 4.5 cm
